title: stelis sotoarenasii
intro: Stelis sotoarenasii, also known as the Soto Arenas' Stelis, is a species of orchid that is native to Costa Rica. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Stelis sotoarenasii include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, often used in traditional medicine, and has been studied for its potential in developing new treatments for various diseases.
